_publications._publicationTitle: Microarray analyses reveal regional astrocyte heterogeneity with implications for neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1)-regulated glial proliferation.

_contextSnippet: FOXP2 immunocytochemistry revealed that >90% positive of ON astroglial cells expressed FOXP2 compared to <10% of the astroglial cells from CTX, CB and BS
details: >90% of optic nerve astroglial cells expressed FOXP2 compared to <10% of astroglial cells from cortex, cerebellum and brainstem
